_metadata.description: Open WebUI feature flags for Nemotron Ultra 550B via NVIDIA Cloud NIM

corrected_v010: function_calling.enabled: false → true (NIM supports tool calling per official docs)

function_calling._note: NIM Ultra 550B supports tool calling. Tool call parser qwen3_coder configured server-side by NVIDIA.
function_calling._evidence: Official docs show explicit tool calling examples. All backends use --tool-call-parser qwen3_coder.
function_calling._benchmark: BM-09: verify qwen3_coder format is OW-compatible
function_calling._warning_sglang: If Cloud NIM uses SGLang backend: MUST inject chat_template_kwargs via Pipeline for tool calls + reasoning

reasoning_mode._evidence: Official NVIDIA docs: /think and /nothink system prompt directives documented

rag._critical: Cloud NIM does NOT expose /v1/embeddings. RAG will fail without separate embedding provider.
_recommended_providers: nvidia/nv-embedqa-e5-v5 (via NVIDIA Cloud NIM — separate endpoint)

memory._note: Memory is OW-side. Transparent to NIM. Memory injection counts against context budget (REQ-AI-0007).

image_upload._reason: Nemotron Ultra 550B is text-only. Image uploads not supported.
image_upload._note: Text file upload (PDF, docx) works via text extraction.

image_generation._reason: Requires separate image generation model. Not available from this NIM endpoint.

web_search._note: Search results injected as context. Transparent to NIM. Monitor context budget REQ-AI-0007.

code_execution._note: OW-side sandbox execution. Transparent to NIM.

voice_stt._note: STT processed before NIM call. Transparent to NIM.

voice_tts._note: TTS post-processing of NIM response. Transparent to NIM.
